name: Hummus
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onions and minced garlic to the pan with sesame oil. Cook until the onions are just tender.
3. Transfer the sautéed onions and garlic into a food processor or blender.
4. Add drained garbanzo beans, toasted sesame seeds, sesame butter, fresh lemon juice, turmeric, and salt to the food processor.
5. Blend all ingredients together until you reach your desired consistency. If needed, add more sesame oil gradually for a thinner texture.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if required by adding salt or lemon juice.
7. Serve garnished with parsley and additional toasted sesame seeds, if desired.
